subject: fix: harden hooks and components against edge cases (round 5)
body:
Address 11 issues found during deep code review:

- FuelMapWeb: Replace Math.min(...spread) with reduce (crash on empty array)
- usePWAUpdate: Clean up statechange listeners to prevent memory leak stacking
- useFuelTypes: Add mountedRef guard to prevent setState after unmount
- CoordinatePicker: Compare coordinates numerically instead of as strings
  (fixes false positive change detection with trailing zeros)
- LocationSearch: Add mountedRef guard in fetchSuggestions finally block
- useAppTheme: Change context default to null, add null checks in
  useAppTheme/useThemeMode (matches useAuth pattern for provider boundary)
- Station detail: Guard prices[0] access with null check (empty array crash)
- Admin login: Sanitize error message length (slice to 200 chars)
- PriceEditor: Remove fuelTypes.length from dep array (anti-pattern)
- Admin layout: Remove router from useEffect dep array (unstable reference)
- useRecentSearches: Validate coordinates in isDuplicate to prevent NaN bypass

All 52 tests pass.

Tags: review, hardening, hooks, memory-leak, edge-cases
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: codebase-review
Semver: patch

title: harden hooks and components against edge cases (round 5)
